rationale: Educ. Code §29.060 governs bilingual education summer programs. It contains no reference to homestead exemptions, property tax values, or Tax Code §11.13. No direct conflict exists.
quote: The programs required or authorized by this section may not be a substitute for programs required to be provided during the regular school year.
_note: No direct textual conflict. Indirect fiscal impact on school district funding is possible but not a statutory conflict with this section.
